case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. (USA) VS. JENNIFER S HUANG et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-20-2008 CONTINUED TO SEP-05-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. (USA) ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-15-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). THE SEP-05-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. (USA) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUANG, JENNIFER S $17,961.20 PRINCIPAL, $399.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,360.95, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
